qas.q: Assistant secretary of the Air Force for installations, environment, and energy ____ policy and provides ___ of all matter pertaining to the formulation review and execution of plans, policies, programs and budgets relative to the RP Program
ESOH
___ conducts senior level review of the AF occupational and environmental heal program in accordance with AFI 90-801
Who Formulates, publishes, reviews and ___ plans policies, programs and budget for the medical support of occupational and environmental health program.
Air Force surgeon generals office reports the status of the AF respiratory protection program as a part of the ___ OEH program review
___ ___ ___ ___ ___ Supports Surgeon General with developing policy to execute the respiratory protection program
Air Force medical support agency develops and monitors AF-level performance measures to assess respiratory protection program ___
Who advocates for defense health program funding needed for the AF medical service to execute respiratory protection program requirements

Air Force medical operations agency validates and allocates DHP resources required for ___ surveillance associated with respiratory protection program activities at installations, DRU's, FOA's and geographically separated units.
Who provides respiratory protection training for Bioenvironmental Engineering personnel through initial technical training course
Who identifies programmatic, policy, and safety releases, and provides guidance to installation and MAJCOM BE's
Who advocates for resources within the command for RP
The MAJCOM Be resolves questions regarding specific interpretations of this and applicable ___ standards, and if necessary, coordinate with AFMSA
MAJCOM BE ___ information pertaining to programmatic, policy and safety releases concerning respiratory protection within the MAJCOM
Installation Commander or equivalent directs the execution of the installation respiratory protection program through the installation OEH program AFI__ ___
Who establishes policies and procedures to implement this instruction at the installation level
Who designates the installation respiratory protection program administrator
Logistics commander ensures serviceable CBRN mask are issued after performing ___ sizing measurement.
Who ensures BE is notified immediately upon receipt of a respirator recall notice or noice of defect from either a manufacturer or NIOSH
Who develops and implements procedures for controlling the ordering and issuing of respirators
Military Treatment Facility (MTF) Ensures a physician or other licensed health care professional, as defined in 29 CFR 1910.___
Who Ensure medical evaluations are provided to personnel enrolled in the respiratory protection program
